untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option volume data (not stock volume) and a predictive model with regime-specific slope coefficients (-46 pre-1997, -60 post-1997). Option volume is not in the allowed indicators list. The relationship between option volume and next-day stock returns cannot be directly expressed with available stock-based indicators. A proxy using stock volume was attempted but does not capture the original option volume signal.
translation_notes: Original signal: SHORT position based on high option volume predicting negative next-day returns (1-day holding period). Entry condition requires option volume relative to baseline; exit is automatic at close of day +1. Parameters indicate -46 to -60 basis points impact depending on regime. Cannot be accurately translated without access to option volume data.
